text: I start my day at 6:30 a.m. with a glass of water and a short meditation. After getting ready, I have a light breakfast and leave for work by 8:00. My office schedule runs from 9 to 6, with a lunch break around midday. I usually stay consistent with a gym session after work, doing a mix of cardio and strength training for 40 minutes. In the evening, I prepare dinner, unwind by reading or watching a series, and aim to be in bed by 10:30 p.m. This routine helps me stay productive and balanced.
